name: Jaime San Martin
title: Gerente General
subject: improving safety procedures at your mine sites
draft_body: Hi Jaime, as someone who understands the importance of safety in mining operations, I wanted to reach out given the recent penalties imposed on contractors like Züblin and SalfaCorp. Anglo American has seen success in reducing safety procedure violations through proactive measures. Worth 15 minutes to discuss how you're currently handling site inspections and potential areas for improvement?
source_signal_used: Contractors Züblin, SalfaCorp and Constructora Gardilcic received higher penalties than Codelco for safety procedure violations after the El Teniente mine collapse

name: Sebastián Andrés González Valdivia
title: Jefe HSE
subject: improving site inspections at your mining operations
draft_body: Hi Sebastián, as Jefe HSE, you likely oversee complex site operations similar to those at Escondida, where multiple pits and concentrator plants require meticulous management. Anglo American has seen success in streamlining their processes. Worth 15 minutes to discuss how you currently handle site inspections?
source_signal_used: Escondida’s two pits feed three concentrator plants, as well as two leaching operations

subject: improving safety records in latam mining
draft_body: Hi, I came across the impressive safety record at Thacker Pass and wondered if you're exploring similar initiatives at your organization. Anglo American has seen significant reductions in incident rates through proactive measures. Worth 15 minutes to discuss how you're currently handling site safety?
source_signal_used: 1.69 million workhours were completed at Thacker Pass without a serious injury or lost-time incident in 2025
